title: Experiment manifest
description: What produced a results number (M3.1): the code commit, worktree cleanliness, data hashes, environment lock, seed, metric definitions, and generated artifacts. The ts is caller-supplied per D19 so a manifest hashes identically on replay.

run_id.description: Groups every event of one logical run.

code_commit.description: Git commit the run was made from.

dirty_worktree.description: Whether the worktree had uncommitted changes at run time. True fails the C006 artifact-code-drift check.

data_hashes.description: Content hashes of the input data files.

seed.description: The RNG seed, if the run used one.

artifact_hashes.description: The generated outputs and their content hashes. A hand edit to a generated number changes the artifact content without updating this, so the C002 mismatch is detectable.

ts.description: Caller-supplied timestamp (D19). Never self-generated, so replays stay deterministic.
